name: round5-golden-corpus
description: Curated retrieval gold-set used by `make eval` and the CI quality gate. Cases cover the four fan-out backends (vector / bm25 / graph / memory). expected_chunk_ids names the canonical chunk(s) every backend stub returns; expected_min_score ensures we don't silently regress on absolute relevance. backend is a documentation hint matching tests/eval/eval_ci_test.go which routes the case to the matching fake.

cases.query: How do we rotate connector credentials safely?
What is the on-device shard policy for low-tier devices?
Where does the privacy strip get rendered?
How does the semantic cache key requests?
What deadline does the retrieval fan-out apply per backend?
Slack webhook signature verification HMAC secret
GraphRAG FalkorDB subgraph prune delete document
Kafka consumer commit offset DLQ poison pill
Postgres migration 014 tenant usage metering
Reciprocal rank fusion merger weights
Which entities link a Notion page to its parent workspace?
What chunks share an author with the credential rotation runbook?
How are retention rules linked to namespace IDs?
Which DLQ messages share a root_cause edge with index health failures?
Remind me what we agreed about cursor pagination defaults.
What did Jane decide about RBAC roles last sprint?
Recall the eval threshold the team committed to in the runbook.
Does the connector dry-run preview persist credentials anywhere?
Idempotency key middleware Redis 24h cache POST PATCH DELETE
How does the index watchdog auto-trigger reindex when a backend is unhealthy?
